homepage.heroSubline: Durable, beautiful floors installed with precision. Serving Hampton Roads for over a decade.
aboutText: Floor Magicians Inc started with a simple goal: to provide exceptional flooring services with unwavering integrity. We're a local team, born and raised in Virginia Beach, committed to enhancing homes and businesses throughout Hampton Roads.

We believe in doing things right the first time. Our approach combines skilled craftsmanship with quality materials, ensuring lasting beauty and performance. We listen to your needs, offer expert advice, and execute every project with meticulous attention to detail.

We're proud to be part of the Virginia Beach community. We support local initiatives and strive to build lasting relationships with our clients. Our commitment extends beyond flooring; it's about enriching the lives of our neighbors.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free, no-obligation quote for your flooring project.

services.name: Hardwood Flooring Installation
services.shortDescription: Bring warmth and elegance to your home with expertly installed hardwood floors.
services.description:
Hardwood flooring adds timeless beauty and value to any property. At Floor Magicians Inc, we specialize in the installation of solid and engineered hardwood, offering a wide variety of wood species, finishes, and plank sizes to match your unique style. We understand the challenges presented by Virginia Beach’s humid summers and fluctuating temperatures, and we take steps to ensure your hardwood floors remain stable and beautiful for years to come. This includes acclimating the wood properly before installation and using moisture-resistant underlayments. 

Our installation process begins with a thorough subfloor inspection and preparation. We address any imperfections or unevenness to create a smooth, level surface for your new hardwood floors. Our experienced installers use precise techniques to ensure a seamless, professional finish. We handle everything from nail-down and glue-down installations to floating floor systems, depending on your specific needs and preferences. 

We also offer hardwood refinishing services to restore the luster of existing hardwood floors. Whether your floors are scratched, faded, or simply outdated, we can sand them down, stain them to your desired color, and apply a protective finish to bring them back to life.

faq.question: How long does hardwood flooring installation take?
faq.answer: The duration depends on the size of the area and the complexity of the installation, but we typically complete most projects within 2-5 days.

faq.question: What type of hardwood is best for Virginia Beach?
faq.answer: Engineered hardwood is often recommended due to its stability in humid conditions. Solid hardwood requires careful acclimation and moisture management.

faq.question: How do I care for my new hardwood floors?
faq.answer: Regular sweeping or vacuuming and occasional damp mopping with a hardwood-specific cleaner are recommended. Avoid excessive moisture and direct sunlight.

services.name: Tile Flooring Installation
services.shortDescription: Durable and stylish tile flooring installed for kitchens, bathrooms, and more.
services.description:
Tile flooring offers exceptional durability, versatility, and style, making it an ideal choice for kitchens, bathrooms, entryways, and other high-traffic areas. Floor Magicians Inc specializes in the professional installation of ceramic, porcelain, and natural stone tile, providing a wide range of design options to enhance your home or business. We understand the importance of proper waterproofing in moisture-prone areas like bathrooms and kitchens, especially given Virginia Beach's humid climate. Our team uses industry-leading techniques and materials to ensure a watertight seal and prevent water damage. 

Our tile installation process begins with a thorough assessment of the subfloor. We ensure it is level, clean, and structurally sound to provide a stable base for the tile. We then apply a high-quality mortar and carefully lay the tile according to your chosen pattern and design. Our expert installers pay close attention to detail, ensuring precise cuts, even spacing, and a flawless finish. 

We also offer tile repair and replacement services. Whether you have cracked, chipped, or loose tiles, we can restore your tile floor to its original beauty.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation and Material Selection
Step 4: Precise Tile Installation and Grouting
benefits: Wide variety of styles and colors

faq.question: What type of tile is best for a bathroom?
faq.answer: Porcelain tile is a popular choice due to its water resistance and durability. Natural stone tiles like travertine and slate can also be used, but require proper sealing.

faq.question: How long does tile installation take?
faq.answer: The duration depends on the size of the area and the complexity of the design, but most projects are completed within 3-7 days.

faq.question: How do I clean tile floors?
faq.answer: Regular sweeping or vacuuming and occasional mopping with a mild detergent are recommended. Avoid using abrasive cleaners or scouring pads.

services.name: Laminate Flooring Installation
services.shortDescription: Affordable and stylish laminate flooring for any room in your home.
services.description:
Laminate flooring is a cost-effective and versatile flooring option that mimics the look of hardwood, tile, or stone. Floor Magicians Inc offers professional laminate flooring installation services, providing a wide range of styles, colors, and textures to suit any décor. Laminate flooring is particularly well-suited for busy households with children and pets due to its scratch resistance and ease of maintenance. We understand the importance of proper subfloor preparation to ensure a smooth, level surface for your new laminate floors. 

Our installation process begins with a thorough inspection of the subfloor. We address any imperfections or unevenness to prevent warping or buckling. We then install a moisture barrier to protect the laminate from moisture damage. Our experienced installers use precise techniques to ensure a seamless, professional finish. 

Laminate flooring is easy to clean and maintain, making it a practical choice for any room in your home. It's also a great option for basements, as it's more resistant to moisture than hardwood.
benefits: Wide variety of styles and colors

faq.question: Is laminate flooring waterproof?
faq.answer: While laminate flooring is water-resistant, it is not completely waterproof. It's important to clean up spills promptly to prevent water damage.

faq.question: How long does laminate flooring installation take?
faq.answer: The duration depends on the size of the area, but most projects are completed within 1-3 days.

faq.question: Can I install laminate flooring myself?
faq.answer: While it is possible to install laminate flooring yourself, professional installation is recommended to ensure a smooth, even surface and prevent future problems.

services.name: Vinyl Flooring Installation
services.shortDescription: Waterproof and durable vinyl flooring, perfect for kitchens, bathrooms, and basements.
services.description:
Vinyl flooring is a waterproof and highly durable flooring option that is ideal for kitchens, bathrooms, basements, and other moisture-prone areas. Floor Magicians Inc offers professional vinyl flooring installation services, providing a wide range of styles, colors, and patterns to suit any décor. Vinyl flooring is also a great choice for families with children and pets due to its scratch and stain resistance. Given the coastal environment of Virginia Beach, vinyl's resistance to moisture and mildew makes it a smart choice. 

Our installation process begins with a thorough inspection of the subfloor. We ensure it is level, clean, and dry to provide a stable base for the vinyl. We then apply a high-quality adhesive and carefully lay the vinyl according to your chosen pattern and design. Our expert installers pay close attention to detail, ensuring precise cuts, even seams, and a flawless finish. 

We offer a variety of vinyl flooring options, including sheet vinyl, vinyl tile, and luxury vinyl plank (LVP). LVP is particularly popular due to its realistic wood-look and enhanced durability.
benefits: Wide variety of styles and colors

faq.question: Is vinyl flooring suitable for basements?
faq.answer: Yes, vinyl flooring is an excellent choice for basements due to its moisture resistance.

faq.question: How long does vinyl flooring installation take?
faq.answer: The duration depends on the size of the area, but most projects are completed within 1-2 days.

faq.question: How do I clean vinyl floors?
faq.answer: Regular sweeping or vacuuming and occasional mopping with a mild detergent are recommended. Avoid using abrasive cleaners or harsh chemicals.

services.name: Floor Repair Services
services.shortDescription: Expert floor repair services to restore your floors to their original condition.
services.description:
Even the most durable floors can suffer damage over time due to wear and tear, accidents, or moisture exposure. Floor Magicians Inc offers comprehensive floor repair services to restore your floors to their original condition. We handle everything from minor scratches and dents to major structural repairs, addressing issues specific to Virginia Beach homes, such as water damage from coastal flooding or foundation settling. 

Our experienced technicians will assess the damage and recommend the most appropriate repair solution. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a lasting repair. Whether you have hardwood, tile, laminate, or vinyl flooring, we have the expertise to fix it right. 

We also offer subfloor repair services to address underlying issues that may be causing damage to your floors. Neglecting subfloor problems can lead to recurring issues and costly repairs down the road.
process: Step 2: Repair Plan and Material Selection
benefits: Extends the life of your floors

faq.question: How much does floor repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of floor repair depends on the extent of the damage and the type of flooring. We offer free estimates to assess the damage and provide a detailed quote.

faq.question: Can you repair water-damaged floors?
faq.answer: Yes, we specialize in repairing water-damaged floors. We will assess the extent of the damage and recommend the most appropriate repair solution.

faq.question: How long does floor repair take?
faq.answer: The duration of floor repair depends on the extent of the damage, but most repairs are completed within 1-3 days.

services.name: Subfloor Installation & Repair
services.shortDescription: Ensuring a solid foundation with expert subfloor services.
services.description:
The subfloor is the foundation upon which your finished flooring rests. A damaged or improperly installed subfloor can lead to a variety of problems, including uneven floors, squeaking, and premature flooring failure. Floor Magicians Inc provides expert subfloor installation and repair services to ensure a solid foundation for your new or existing floors. We're experienced in dealing with common subfloor issues in Virginia Beach homes, such as moisture damage from humidity and settling due to the sandy soil. 

Our services include subfloor leveling, reinforcement, and replacement. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to create a stable, level surface for your finished flooring. We also address any underlying moisture issues to prevent future problems. 

Whether you're installing new flooring or experiencing problems with your existing floors, our subfloor services will ensure a lasting, beautiful result.
benefits: Provides a stable foundation for your floors
Extends the life of your flooring
Improves indoor air quality by preventing mold growth

faq.question: How do I know if I need subfloor repair?
faq.answer: Signs of subfloor damage include uneven floors, squeaking, and visible signs of moisture damage.

faq.question: What materials do you use for subfloor repair?
faq.answer: We use high-quality plywood, OSB, and moisture-resistant materials to ensure a durable and long-lasting repair.

faq.question: How long does subfloor repair take?
faq.answer: The duration of subfloor repair depends on the extent of the damage, but most repairs are completed within 1-2 days.

Floor Magicians Inc is proud to offer our expert flooring installation services to the residents and businesses of Virginia Beach, VA. We understand that choosing the right flooring solution is a significant investment, and we are committed to providing top-quality craftsmanship and exceptional customer service to ensure your complete satisfaction.

From hardwood and laminate to tile and carpet, our experienced team can handle any flooring project, big or small. reviews.name: Sarah K.
reviews.text: Floor Magicians installed beautiful hardwood floors in our living room and dining room. The team was professional, efficient, and paid great attention to detail. We are thrilled with the results!

reviews.name: John B.
reviews.text: We hired Floor Magicians to install tile in our master bathroom. They did a great job with the installation, and the tile looks fantastic. There was a slight delay due to a material shortage, but they communicated well and kept us informed.

reviews.name: Emily R.
reviews.text: Floor Magicians installed laminate flooring in our basement. The price was competitive, and the quality of the work was excellent. The team was friendly and professional, and they cleaned up thoroughly after the job was done.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: We needed new flooring in our laundry room, and Floor Magicians recommended vinyl. It was a great choice! The installation was quick, and the floor looks fantastic. It's also super easy to clean, which is a huge plus.

reviews.name: Jessica M.
reviews.text: Floor Magicians repaired some damaged hardwood flooring in our kitchen. They were able to match the existing wood perfectly, and the repair is seamless. Very happy with the service.

reviews.name: Robert P.
reviews.text: After noticing some unevenness in our floors, Floor Magicians discovered significant subfloor damage. They did a fantastic job repairing the subfloor and installing new flooring. The floors are now perfectly level and look amazing. Highly recommend!
